positive_examples: Can you add this to the knowledge vault as a new wiki note?
Please lint the notes before I commit the vault changes.
I want to file this research into a vault note with proper links.
negative_examples: Can you refactor this function to use async/await?

rollback.method: Remove "markdown-vault" from every profiles/*.json skills array, then delete skills/markdown-vault/. The skill has no side effects beyond linting a given vault directory on demand, so no state migration is needed.
